name: Subagents Catalog
description: Curated index of subagent definitions, agent harnesses, and platform-specific subagent formats

subagents.name: awesome-claude-code-subagents
subagents.description: Curated list of 154+ Claude Code subagent definitions including code-reviewer, debugger, test-writer, planner, and more. VoltAgent's definitive collection of reusable agent personas.

subagents.name: awesome-codex-subagents
subagents.description: Curated collection of 171+ OpenAI Codex CLI subagent definitions in TOML format. Covers code review, testing, documentation, architecture, and deployment roles.

subagents.name: cc-sdd
subagents.description: Claude Code subagent definitions for software design and development workflows. 17 role-specific skills for multi-agent development pipelines.

subagents.name: buildwithclaude
subagents.description: 117+ Claude Code agents and automation templates for building production applications. Includes code-reviewer, test-writer, deployer, and documentation subagents.

subagents.name: claude-code-subagents
subagents.description: 100+ subagent definitions for Claude Code covering code review, debugging, testing, refactoring, and documentation workflows.

subagents.name: Claude-Code-Subagents-Collection
subagents.description: Open-source collection of reusable Claude Code subagent definitions for common development tasks. Starter pack for agent-driven workflows.

subagents.name: fastagent-plugins
subagents.description: Plugin collection with pre-configured subagent roles and tool integrations for multi-agent frameworks. Includes reviewer, tester, and deployer roles.

subagents.name: awesome-gemini-cli-subagents
subagents.description: Curated list of Gemini CLI subagent configurations and custom agent prompts for coding assistance. Includes code-reviewer, test-writer, and documentation agents.

subagents.name: oh-my-openagent
subagents.description: Agent harness with async subagent orchestration. Manages subagent delegation, parallel execution, and result aggregation across multiple agent personas.

subagents.name: oh-my-opencode
subagents.description: Agent harness for OpenCode with subagent management, tool delegation, and workflow orchestration. Extends OpenCode with multi-agent capabilities.

subagents.name: oh-my-codex
subagents.description: Codex orchestration harness with 33 agent prompts. Manages subagent lifecycle, handoffs, and coordinated task execution for Codex CLI.

subagents.name: awesome-claude-code
subagents.description: Ecosystem directory indexing 47K+ stars of Claude Code resources including subagent collections, skills, MCP servers, and community extensions.

subagents.name: Claude Agent SDK
subagents.description: Official Anthropic SDK for building agentic applications with Claude. Supports tool delegation, multi-turn conversations, and structured subagent outputs.

subagents.name: OpenAI Agents SDK
subagents.description: OpenAI's production-ready framework for building multi-agent systems with handoffs, guardrails, and tracing. Supports subagent delegation patterns.

subagents.name: Google ADK
subagents.description: Google's Agent Development Kit with sub-agent orchestration support. Build, deploy, and manage hierarchical agent systems with Gemini models.

subagents.name: Microsoft Agent Framework
subagents.description: Microsoft's comprehensive framework for building autonomous AI agents with multi-agent patterns, Azure integration, and .NET/Python support.

subagents.name: Claude Code Subagent Format
subagents.description: Claude Code subagents are defined as Markdown files with YAML frontmatter placed in .claude/agents/ directory. Each file becomes a callable agent persona.

subagents.name: Codex CLI Subagent Format
subagents.description: Codex CLI subagents use TOML configuration files placed in .codex/agents/ directory. Each TOML file defines agent name, prompt, tools, and behavior.

subagents.name: Gemini CLI Subagent Format
subagents.description: Gemini CLI subagents use Markdown with YAML frontmatter placed in .gemini/agents/ directory. Similar to Claude Code's agent format.

subagents.name: OpenCode Subagent Format
subagents.description: OpenCode subagents use Markdown with YAML frontmatter placed in .opencode/agents/ directory. Supports custom tools, prompts, and agent delegation.

subagents.name: Curated Subagent Repositories
subagents.description: Index of GitHub repositories containing subagent definitions across Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI platforms.

subagents.name: Platform Subagent Formats Overview
subagents.description: Cross-platform reference for subagent definition formats across Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, and OpenCode.
